qa_pairs.question: Which journals with a theme at Cleveland Browns have sales of at least 3534 and include a committee member whose work type is Photo?
qa_pairs.sql:
SELECT journal.journal_id FROM journal
JOIN journal_committee ON journal.journal_id = journal_committee.journal_id
JOIN editor ON journal_committee.editor_id = editor.editor_id
WHERE journal_committee.work_type = 'Photo' AND journal.sales >= 3534 AND journal.theme = 'at Cleveland Browns'
